---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "I teach."
title-block-banner: false
---

I have over a decade of teaching experience in linguistics and French-language studies. During this time, I have taught more than ten course sections as instructor of record and served as a teaching assistant for roughly twice as many. My teaching has covered areas such as lexicology, introductory linguistics, grammar, writing, and language acquisition.

Below is a selection of courses I have taught recently as instructor of record.

## Introduction to Linguistics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/placeholder1.jpg)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**Université Laval**  
Fall 2025; Fall 2023; Fall 2022  
Instructor of record

An introductory course covering the main areas of linguistic analysis, including sounds, words, sentences, meaning, language variation, and the structure of human language.
:::

:::

## Lexicologie

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/placeholder2.JPG)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**Université Laval**  
Winter 2025; Winter 2024  
Instructor of record

A course on the study of the lexicon, with attention to word formation, lexical meaning, lexical relations, neology, dictionaries, and the role of usage in lexical analysis.
:::

:::

## Understanding Grammar

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/placeholder3.JPG)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**Université Laval**  
Fall 2024  
Instructor of record

A course focused on grammatical analysis and the tools used to describe language structure, with attention to how grammar works in actual language use.
:::

:::
